channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pittsburgh Hosts NFL Draft for First Time in Nearly 80 Years
item.description: The Pennsylvania city is welcoming the NFL Draft for the first time since the 1940s, with residents citing a passionate fan culture and a history of championship teams.

item.title: Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Extended Three Weeks; Trump Loosens Medical Marijuana Rules
item.description: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to a three-week ceasefire extension, while the Trump administration separately announced changes to federal medical marijuana regulations.

item.title: U.S. Blockade Leaves Thousands of Sailors Stranded as Global Trade Disrupted
item.description: An ongoing U.S. blockade on Iranian ports has left thousands of seafarers unable to proceed, with economic disruptions spreading across international shipping and trade.

item.title: Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Renewed for 3 Weeks Amid Escalating Hormuz Tensions
item.description: Despite a three-week ceasefire extension, Hezbollah and Israel exchanged fire within hours of the announcement, raising questions about the agreement's durability.

item.title: Robots That Learn by Watching Humans Raise New Safety and Ethical Questions
item.description: Researchers report a breakthrough enabling robots to independently master complex tasks through human observation, though experts say the advance raises significant safety and ethical concerns.
